message:
🧹 Replace duplicate formatBytes, ISOLATION_STATUS_COLORS, and DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE with shared imports (#10359)

- Replace local formatBytes in NetworkTraceCard with import from lib/formatters
- Extract ISOLATION_STATUS_COLORS and IsolationStatus to multi-tenancy/shared.ts
- Replace local DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE = 5 in 3 components with import from lib/constants/ui

Fixes #10353

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
